title: llcResonant
description: The description of an LLC Resonant converter excitation

inputVoltage.description: The input voltage of the LLC converter

minSwitchingFrequency.description: The minimum switching frequency for regulation

maxSwitchingFrequency.description: The maximum switching frequency for regulation

resonantFrequency.description: The resonant frequency of the tank (optional, will be calculated if not provided)

qualityFactor.description: The quality factor of the resonant tank

integratedResonantInductor.description: Whether the resonant inductor is integrated in the transformer (leakage)

seriesInductance.description: Optional explicit resonant inductor (Ls) value in H. Overrides the Q/Ln/fr derivation when set.

resonantCapacitance.description: Optional explicit resonant capacitor (Cr) value in F. Overrides the Q/Ln/fr derivation when set.

llcBridgeType.description: The type of primary bridge for LLC
llcBridgeType.title: llcBridgeType

llcOperatingPoint.description: The description of one LLC operating point
llcOperatingPoint.title: llcOperatingPoint
